topic: There are photos on my phone taken inside my house of me sleeping that I never took
title: There Are Photos on My Phone Taken Inside My House While I Was Asleep | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: There are photos on my phone I never took. All of them are of me, asleep, in my own bed.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a smartphone screen displaying a dim photo of a sleeping person in bed, the phone held in a hand, dark bedroom, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I live alone. I lock my phone. It sleeps on the nightstand, face down.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a small dim bedroom at night, a phone lying face down on a nightstand beside a bed, faint streetlight through curtains, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I check my gallery every morning.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a hand scrolling a phone photo gallery in the morning, dim room light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The first one was stamped three forty in the morning. A photo of my sleeping face.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a phone screen showing a grainy timestamped photo of a sleeping face in dim light, the time visible, vertical 9:16 framing
close overhead shot of a person sleeping in bed seen from directly above, dim night light, blanket pulled up, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Close enough to see my breath fog the lens.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a sleeping face partially obscured, faint fog near the camera, very dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I set a passcode no one knows.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a phone screen showing a passcode entry pad, dim bedroom, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Next morning. A new photo. Same time.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a phone screen with a new dim photo of a sleeping figure, timestamp in the corner, dark room, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Each night the camera is closer. Then it was beside me on the pillow.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a phone propped on a pillow beside a sleeping person, dim night light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last night's photo was taken from under the blanket, looking up at my face.
scenes.image_prompt: low upward shot from beneath a blanket looking toward a dim sleeping face above, faint light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I sleep at my sister's now. I left the phone at home.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a tidy guest bedroom at night, a made bed, dim lamp, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: This morning a new photo arrived. Me, asleep, in her guest room.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a phone screen showing a dim photo of a person asleep in an unfamiliar guest room, vertical 9:16 framing
